testsuite.name: com.beeo.app.data.repository.AuthRepositoryTest

testcase.name: signInWithGoogle cuando Firestore falla retorna Error
signInWithGoogle con credenciales invalidas retorna Error
currentUser retorna null cuando no hay sesion
signInWithGoogle con idToken null retorna Cancelled
signInWithGoogle cuando user es null retorna Error
currentUser retorna usuario cuando hay sesion activa
signInWithGoogle con error de red retorna Error
signInWithGoogle exitoso con usuario nuevo retorna Success y guarda en Firestore
signInWithGoogle exitoso con usuario existente retorna Success

testsuite.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\mustdie\.gradle\caches\modules-2\files-2.1\net.bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.10\90ed94ac044ea8953b224304c762316e91fd6b31\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.10.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
